target.name: Tekever
target.founder: Ricardo Mendes, Vitor Cristina, Pedro Sinogas

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $631M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Drones & Autonomous (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 4 same-sector peers exist in Drones & Autonomous, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Percepto
private.rationale: Same sector (Drones & Autonomous), same stage (Series C)

private.name: Monarch Tractor
private.rationale: Same sector (Drones & Autonomous), same stage (Series C)

data.narrative:
Tekever is a Series C-stage autonomous systems company in the Drones & Autonomous sector that has raised $631M+ to date. The broader sector includes six private peers, among them Joby Aviation, Nuro, and Archer Aviation, though no direct public comparables exist. The peer set lacks sufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage matches with similar valuation tiers to support a reliable peer-median approach.

The analysis relies on stage-progression methodology, applying a 1.7x step-up multiplier typical of Series C advancement to the $631M total raised proxy. This yields an implied valuation of $1.1B. The wide spacing between the low and high points of the triangulated range—$912M and $1.2B respectively—reflects reliance on a single applicable method rather than convergence across multiple approaches. The median of $1.1B anchors the single-method estimate.

Key uncertainties are material. The peer-median method was inapplicable due to insufficient comparable datapoints within narrow stage and tier filters; a broader sectoral median would lack precision. The stage-progression multiplier, while empirically grounded in typical venture step-ups, may not capture Tekever-specific execution risk, market timing, or competitive positioning. A full valuation would benefit from revenue multiple analysis or discounted cash flow treatment, neither available in the current dataset. The $912M–$1.2B range should be treated as a preliminary frame pending additional operational and market data.
